preamble: The shift from the diphthong [ei] to [ie] is a form of diphthong metathesis or quality shift, often involving fronting and changes in vowel height.

examples.note: Shift in the internal quality of the diphthong.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
